content.full_text:
January 29, 1990

Ms. Linda Cassidy
Political Reform Consultant
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Ms. Cassidy:

This is to confirm our telephone conversation of last week in which you advised me that the issuance of "Assessors' Handbooks" by the California State Board of Equalization does not constitute an "Administrative Action" as defined by Section 82002 of the Government Code. We concluded, therefore, that efforts of the California Cable Television Association to influence the contents of such handbooks is not an activity that is reportable under the Political Reform Act of 1974, as amended.

Thank you for your courtesy and cooperation in this matter.

Sincerely,

William M. Winter

WMW:nm
cc: Spencer Kaitz
    Dennis Mangers
    Sharon Reneau
    Richard Eichman
